ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief description of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the content */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., blog entry, event) */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the content was posted */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Unique slug for the content item */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the content */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the content item */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the content item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blog_entries" (
  "blog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blog entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item (foreign key to content table) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the blog entry */,
  "image" TEXT /* Featured image for the blog entry */,
  "meta_title" TEXT /* Meta title for the blog entry */,
  "meta_description" TEXT /* Meta description for the blog entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blog_entries_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item (foreign key to content table) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "image" TEXT /* Featured image for the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event organizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item (foreign key to content table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last edited */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment (foreign key to comments table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the reply */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the reply was posted */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reply was last edited */,
  "is_reported" INTEGER /* Whether the reply has been reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item (foreign key to content table) */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item (foreign key to content table) */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rsvps" (
  "rsvp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSVP */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event (foreign key to events table) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who RSVP'd */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response of the user (e.g., yes, no, maybe) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the RSVP was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsvp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rsvps_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rsvps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who linked the account */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the user on the social media platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the social media account was linked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item (foreign key to content table) */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the content item */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the content item */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the content item */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies for the content item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
